Labrador Retriever.description: Friendly, outgoing, and highly trainable sporting dog that thrives with family activity and regular exercise.

Golden Retriever.description: Gentle, intelligent, and eager-to-please retriever known for its social nature and dependable temperament.

Flat-Coated Retriever.description: Cheerful and energetic retriever with a playful personality and strong enthusiasm for outdoor work.

Curly-Coated Retriever.description: Independent and athletic retriever with a distinctive curly coat and steady working drive.

Chesapeake Bay Retriever.description: Strong, hardy retriever bred for water work, known for endurance and a protective streak.

Beagle.description: Compact scent hound with a curious nose, upbeat personality, and strong pack-oriented instincts.

German Shepherd.description: Versatile working dog prized for intelligence, confidence, and trainability across many roles.

French Bulldog.description: Compact companion dog with a playful nature, adaptable personality, and affectionate temperament.

Border Collie.description: Exceptionally intelligent herding dog that needs mental stimulation and structured activity.

Boxer.description: Energetic and loyal family dog with a strong build and an expressive, playful personality.

Pug.description: Charming companion breed known for its clownish personality, affection, and compact size.

Siberian Husky.description: Endurance sled dog with high energy, social behavior, and a strong desire to run.

Doberman.description: Athletic and alert working breed known for speed, loyalty, and focused trainability.

Rottweiler.description: Powerful guardian breed with a calm, confident nature when well-trained and socialized.

Chihuahua.description: Tiny companion dog with a bold personality, alert expression, and strong bond with owners.

Pomeranian.description: Lively toy breed with a fluffy coat, confident attitude, and curious, social disposition.

Yorkshire Terrier.description: Small terrier with a big personality, known for confidence and close companionship.

Shih-Tzu.description: Affectionate companion dog bred for household living, with a calm and friendly demeanor.

Samoyed.description: Friendly northern breed with a thick white coat and an energetic, people-oriented personality.

Weimaraner.description: Athletic hunting breed that requires regular exercise, structure, and strong engagement.

Great Dane.description: Giant breed with a gentle temperament, calm indoor behavior, and affectionate family bond.

Saint Bernard.description: Large mountain rescue breed known for patience, gentleness, and calm companionship.

Newfoundland.description: Powerful water-rescue breed with a famously sweet temperament and strong swimming ability.

Basset.description: Low-built scent hound with a calm demeanor, strong nose, and determined tracking style.

Bloodhound.description: Legendary scent hound with exceptional tracking ability and a gentle, determined disposition.

Cocker Spaniel.description: Affectionate sporting companion with a cheerful nature and a desire to stay close to people.

English Springer.description: High-energy sporting dog with strong trainability and enthusiasm for activity and family life.

English Springer Spaniel.description: High-energy sporting dog with strong trainability and enthusiasm for activity and family life.

Maltese Dog.description: Toy companion breed with a silky coat, affectionate personality, and alert presence.

Miniature Poodle.description: Intelligent, trainable companion with an athletic build and low-shedding curly coat.

Standard Poodle.description: Highly intelligent and athletic breed known for trainability and versatility.

Toy Poodle.description: Small but intelligent poodle variant with a lively temperament and strong trainability.

Papillon.description: Small, alert companion with butterfly-like ears and a bright, energetic personality.

Pembroke.description: Compact herding dog with a bold personality, quick intelligence, and strong work ethic.

Cardigan.description: Sturdy herding corgi variety with a calm, watchful temperament and strong family bond.

Vizsla.description: Lean, athletic hunting dog that thrives on exercise and close human companionship.

Whippet.description: Sleek sighthound known for bursts of speed and calm behavior at home.

Irish Setter.description: Elegant sporting dog with high energy, sociability, and a striking red coat.

Scottish Deerhound.description: Large sighthound with a dignified temperament, gentle manners, and steady athleticism.

West Highland White Terrier.description: Compact terrier with a confident personality, bright expression, and sturdy build.

Norwegian Elkhound.description: Nordic hunting breed with a dense coat, confidence, and strong endurance.
